prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约 13295→14641→13747→18948→24648 名，整体呈持续后移趋势；2024 年因江西新高考改革首年，选科组划分导致位次大幅后移约 5200 名，2025 年继续后移约 5700 名，近两年累计后移超 10000 名，反映该校在物理类考生中的竞争热度明显下降；该校在江西省物理类招生计划 2021–2022 年均为 66 人，2023 年 64 人，2024 年 69 人，2025 年 64 人；2026 年计划 68 人，较 2025 年扩招 4 人（+6.25%），扩招幅度适中，对位次有推后作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中农业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2021–2023 年约第 42 名，2024–2025 年约第 47 名，2026 年回升至第 45 名，排名近年基本稳定在 40–50 区间，属于中上水平 211；2026 年高考周期声誉文件中未出现华中农业大学相关负面舆情，声誉整体平稳；抖音热度排名第 54（较热），综合热度约 56.4 万，主要视频内容为毕业巡游等校园生活，未见明显报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，兽医学 A+、畜牧学 A+、作物学 A、水产 A、食品科学与工程 A，共 5 个 A-/A/A+ 学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，但该校以农林生命科学为主 干，相关专业（生物科学类、食品科学类、动物医学等）社会热度偏分化观望或一般；江西省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 474900 人（仅总人数，无分科数据），较 2025 年（历史类 206055+物理类 266425=472480）略有增加约 2420 人（+0.5%），竞争基数微增；华中农业大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区；江西省为邻省，地理距离较近，交通便利，地域偏好无明显偏向；该校在江西省招生规模 适中（物理类 60–70 人），属省外招生中上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近两年累计后移超万位）、2026 年计划扩招 4 人（+6.25%）对位次的推后作用、江西省考生总数微增带来的竞争基数上升，以及声誉平稳、软科排名小幅回升等因素；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 25772 名，区间 25272–26272 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 物理类考生位次在预测区间 25272–26272 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 25000 名以内）可重点冲刺生物科学类基地班和计算机类；位次接近区间上限（26000 名以外）应以三档农林特色专业保底，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 13295→14641→13747→18948→24648, showing a continuous backward trend; in 2024, due to the first year of Jiangxi's new college entrance examination reform, the division of subject groups caused a significant backward shift of about 5200 places, and in 2025, it continued to shift backward by about 5700 places, with a cumulative backward shift of over 10000 places in the past two years, reflecting a notable decline in the university's competitive popularity among Physics Category candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi for Physics Category was 66 in 2021–2022, 64 in 2023, 69 in 2024, and 64 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 68, an increase of 4 (+6.25%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that has a backward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 42nd in 2021–2023, 47th in 2024–2025, and rebounded to 45th in 2026, with rankings generally stable in the 40–50 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no negative public opinion related to Huazhong Agricultural University appeared in the reputation files, and the reputation is generally stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 564,000, mainly featuring campus life videos such as graduation parades, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; there are no records of admission gaps in historical admission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, and Food Science and Engineering A, with a total of 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for candidates interested in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, but the university's main focus is on agriculture, forestry, and life sciences, with related majors (e.g., Biological Sciences, Food Science, Animal Medicine) having polarized or average social popularity; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900 (total only, no subject-specific data), an increase of about 2,420 (+0.5%) compared to 2025 (History Category 206,055 + Physics Category 266,425 = 472,480), with a slight increase in the competition base; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region; Jiangxi is a neighboring province, with close geographical distance and convenient transportation, and no significant regional preference bias; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi is moderate (60–70 for Physics Category), at an upper-middle level among out-of-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of over 10,000 places in the past two years), the backward effect of the 2026 plan to expand enrollment by 4 (+6.25%), the slight increase in the competition base due to a small rise in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, as well as stable reputation and a slight rebound in Soft Science rankings; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 25,772, with a range of 25,272–26,272.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Sciences National Science Base Class, Biotechnology National Life Science and Technology Base Class)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Animal Medicine (Five-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering National Excellent Engineer Program, Food Quality and Safety, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Bioengineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Aquaculture (Aquaculture National Excellent Agriculture and Forestry Talent Program, Aquatic Science and Technology)
- Facility Agriculture Science and Engineering
- Plant Production (Agronomy National Excellent Agriculture and Forestry Talent Program, Plant Science and Technology, Seed Science and Engineering, Plant Protection National Excellent Agriculture and Forestry Talent Program)
- English (Foreign language requirement).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For Physics Category candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 25,272–26,272, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 25,000) can focus on aiming for Biological Sciences base classes and Computer Science; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (outside 26,000) should use Tier 3 agricultural and forestry characteristic majors as safety options to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次小幅回升至 2905、2026 年计划大幅扩招 5 人（+45.45%）对位次的显著推后作用、考生总数微增等因素；预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 3647 名，区间 3147–4147 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 2112→2519→2324→3099→2905, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking moved back to 3099, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 2905, with the fluctuation range in recent two years around 2900–3100; the enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi was 12 students in 2021–2022, 15 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16 students, a significant increase of 5 students (+45.45%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion that will greatly push back the ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science ranking 45th in 2026, stable in the 40–50 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; reputation stable in 2026, no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is moderate, no abnormal signals in application; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+ and other advantageous agricultural disciplines have no direct mapping to History Category enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, Economics, Sociology, etc.), but the overall 211 level of the university still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but with divergent views; Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors are recommended; Chinese Language/Literature majors are recommended; the total number of candidates in Jiangxi in 2026 is about 474,900, slightly increased from 2025; Wuhan is geographically close to Jiangxi with convenient transportation, no significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight recovery of the 2025 ranking to 2905, the significant push-back effect of the 2026 plan expansion of 5 students (+45.45%), and the slight increase in total candidates; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3647, with a range of 3147–4147.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Business Administration (Marketing, Human Resource Management, Accounting, Financial Management, Business Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (Economics, International Economics and Trade, Agricultural and Forestry Economic Management National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program, Rural Regional Development)
- Advertising.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Sociology (Sociology, Social Work)
- English (Foreign language requirement)
- Landscape Architecture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For History Category candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 3147–4147, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3100) can focus on sprinting for Law and Business Administration; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (outside 4000) should use Tier 3 majors as safety to ensure admission.
